title: helichrysum vohimavense
intro: Helichrysum vohimavense is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to Madagascar. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum vohimavense include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
